task_completion.description: Navigate to the global Projects list
task_completion.visual_evidence: The global Projects list page is visible in the browser, showing multiple projects rather than being inside a specific project workspace.
The project list table displays exactly these four columns: 'Name', 'Project status' (or 'Status'), 'Description', and 'Created on'. No extra columns should be visible.

task_completion.description: Sort the list by 'Created on' in descending order
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Created on' column header has a visual indicator showing descending sort order (e.g., a downward pointing arrow next to the text).

task_completion.description: Save the view with the name 'PMO Portfolio'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save view' dialog is visible with 'PMO Portfolio' entered, or the page header/sidebar clearly shows the active saved view is named 'PMO Portfolio'.

task_completion.description: Set the saved view to be public
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Public' checkbox or toggle is selected in the save/settings dialog for the view, or a public/shared icon is visible next to the view name in the sidebar.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to create the view
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is visible interacting with the OpenProject interface, rather than terminal windows executing API or database commands.

integrity.description: The view creation appears genuine and not mocked
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser does not have developer tools open to manipulate the DOM, and the UI styling is consistent with the actual application.

integrity.description: Agent did not just write the requirements in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen shows the actual project management software, not a text editor or note-taking app with the task description pasted into it.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected view name is exactly 'PMO Portfolio'. The exact columns required are 'Name', 'Project status' (or 'Status'), 'Description', and 'Created on'. The sort order must be by 'Created on' descending. The view must be saved as a public view.
